name: Dessert Couscous
recipeIngredient: Prunes, dates, raisins & almonds, as required
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover raw couscous with cold water and drain immediately. Stir with a fork and let rest for 15 minutes.
2. Mix the peanut oil mixture (with 6 tablespoons of water, salt, and cinnamon) into the couscous until the liquid is uniformly absorbed.
3. Place couscous in the top of a couscoussier and place over boiling water. Steam for 30 minutes and remove from heat.
4. Return couscous to a bowl and mix in half the olive oil with your hands. Allow to cool, then sprinkle with 3/4 cup water. Mix well and set aside until it has absorbed all the water.
5. Return to the couscoussier and steam for another 15 minutes. Return to the bowl, add half the remaining oil, and mix with your fingers.
6. Steam again for another 30 minutes. Return to the bowl for one last time and mix in the rest of the oil.
7. Arrange couscous in a cone shape on a large serving platter. Decorate attractively with the garnishes and serve while still hot.
